name: Hakuto-R program
tagline: First private Japanese lunar lander; M1 + M2 both crashed
description: Hakuto-R program is a planetary lander built by ispace in Japan. First private Japanese lunar lander; M1 + M2 both crashed. Flew in 2023 but failed; informs the redemption-arc layer of the commercial era epoch.
best_known_for: First private Japanese lunar lander; M1 + M2 both crashed
